text.title: Agent Postmortem Template (Agent-as-Defendant) Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when agent-postmortem-template is applied incorrectly. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), root cause (`reason`), and corrective fix (in `note`).

antipattern.description: Postmortem blames 'the model'; same incident recurs next month.
antipattern.note: Fix: Apply r3; if undecidable, escalate to second reviewer.
Fix: Block close until eval is green on the regression case.

antipattern.reason: Paraphrased diff hides the actual change.
antipattern.note: Fix: Apply r2: byte-exact unified diff with variables substituted.
